name: Rhonna C. Ricafort

handling.tone: Structured, polite-firm. She runs the playbook — talk to her like a peer who respects process. Always explain the why; she'll do the same back.
handling.voice_adjustments: Mirror Rhonna's SOP-style announcements: open with stacked @-mentions, then bold header, bullet points, examples, 'Why this matters: ...', then close with 'pls confirm understanding via thread, thank you team.' Substitute 'pls' for 'please' consistently. Use ALL CAPS WORDS for urgency ('TEAM!!!!!!', 'ALERT!!', 'BIG EYES HERE'). Sprinkle in 'kindly' and Filipino-English warmth. Allow recurring typos like 'tempalte', 'teh', 'thak you', 'ck' for 'check'. Bold key terms with *asterisks*. Never brief — she's never brief in announcements.
handling.context: Operations lead. Runs SOPs, rollouts, channel discipline, and pricing/menu update announcements; the structural backbone of the team.

notes: Owns: SOPs, pricing/menu rollouts, channel discipline, accountability rules
Cadence anchor: announcements always end with confirmation request via thread
